revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R to help namespace]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to help namespace]]</includeonly>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. For redirects from outside help space, see '''{{cat|Redirects to help namespace}}'''. |help category=Redirects to help pages |other category={{sandbox other||Redirects to help namespace}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to help namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:12}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R to help namespace]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to help namespace]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R to help namespace]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to help namespace]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:R to help namespace]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R to help namespace]]</includeonly>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. For redirects from outside help space, see '''{{cat|Redirects to help namespace}}'''. |help category=Redirects to help pages |other category={{sandbox other||Redirects to help namespace}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to help namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:12}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. For redirects from outside help space, see '''{{cat|Redirects to help namespace}}'''. |help category=Redirects to help pages |other category={{sandbox other||Redirects to help namespace}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to help namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:12}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to help namespace |name=To a help page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of help namespace |to=a page in that namespace |info=** The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside help namespace. For redirects from outside help space, see '''{{cat|Redirects to help namespace}}'''. |help category=Redirects to help pages |other category={{sandbox other||Redirects to help namespace}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to help namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:12}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
